name: Thalassa Voulgaris
summary: Highly skilled Senior Frontend Engineer with over 8 years of experience specializing in building scalable, high-performance web applications using React and TypeScript. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams to deliver complex UI architectures and optimizing frontend performance for global user bases.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Lead the migration of a legacy monolithic frontend to a micro-frontend architecture using React and TypeScript. Improved page load times by 40% and mentored a team of 5 junior developers.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
experience.description: Developed and maintained responsive customer-facing dashboards. Implemented complex state management solutions using Redux and optimized API integration workflows.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.description: Built interactive marketing websites and custom CMS components. Collaborated closely with designers to ensure pixel-perfect implementation of UI/UX specifications.
